title: Request for a "Save" or "Confirm" button for Admin User Management
excerpt: There is an incident of accidentally changing user types to guest or viewers. This removes the permissions to the private workspaces and boards. Even if we add the person back into the workspace, it doesnt add the person…

posts.author: leeqiqi (Lee Qi Qi)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is an incident of accidentally changing user types to guest or viewers. This removes the permissions to the private workspaces and boards. Even if we add the person back into the workspace, it doesnt add the person back to the private or shareable boards.

Would like to request for a Request for a “Save” or “Confirm” button for Admin User Management
